name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M14217/Perfect Match] This All In BB Tote interprets a vacation style with the leisurely elegance of Southern France, reaffirming the brand's exquisite craftsmanship. The raffia body incorporates iconic leather elements, while the bright lock adds a refined touch. The lightweight structure makes it an ideal choice for beach time and various occasions. 18 x 12 x 16 cm (H x W x D)
